languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

languages.text: "Какой интересный выбор слов — "смерть врагам фон Валанциус". Значит, ты — из рода Себериана. Не знаю, что именно привело тебя по следам предка — наивное желание его спасти, или схожая склонность к стяжательству, но не думаю, что ты будешь возражать, если я объясню, как он — а теперь и ты — оказались здесь".

"An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

Не знаю, что именно привело тебя по следам предка — наивное желание его спасти, или схожая склонность к стяжательству, но не думаю, что ты будешь возражать, если я объясню, как он — а теперь и ты — оказались здесь".

Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

"An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

"An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

languages.text: 「ヴァランシウスの敵に死を。興味深い言葉選びだね。あなたは確かにシベリアンの血筋だ。彼を救おうという無邪気な願いか、祖先と同じように強欲のような欲求があなたを導いたのかはわからないが、彼が、そしてあなたもここに来た経緯を説明してもいいだろう」
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: 「ヴァランシウスの敵に死を。興味深い言葉選びですね。あなたは確かにシベリアンの血筋です。彼を救おうという無邪気な願いか、祖先と同じように avarice のような欲求があなたを導いたのかはわかりませんが、彼が、そしてあなたもここに来た経緯を説明してもいいでしょう。」

languages.text: “‘冯·瓦兰修斯之敌皆当诛灭’——很有趣的措辞。看来你确实是塞贝里安的血脉。我不知道，你追循你先祖的足迹来到这里，是出于想要救他的天真渴望，还是出于同样贪婪的本性。但想必你不会反对，让我解释一下他——以及现在的你——是如何沦落至此的。”
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: “‘冯·瓦兰修斯之敌皆当诛灭’——很有趣的措辞。看来你确实是塞贝里安的血脉。我不知道，你追循你先祖的足迹来到这里，是出于想要救他的天真渴望，还是出于同样贪婪的本性。但想必你不会反对，让我解释一下他——以及现在的你——是如何沦落至此的。”

languages.text: «Una elección de palabras interesante: "muerte a los enemigos de los von Valancius". Perteneces, entonces, a la línea de Seberian. Desconozco si sería un ingenuo deseo de salvarlo o una avaricia similar a la suya lo que te ha hecho seguir el rastro de tu antecesor, pero sé que te interesará saber cómo acabó aquí... y cómo has llegado tú».
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: «Una elección de palabras interesante: "muerte a los enemigos de los von Valancius". Perteneces, entonces, a la línea de Seberian. Desconozco si sería un ingenuo deseo de salvarlo o una avaricia similar a la suya lo que te ha hecho seguir el rastro de tu antecesor, pero sé que te interesará saber cómo acabó aquí... y cómo has llegado tú».

languages.text: "Eine interessante Wortwahl — 'Tod den Feinden derer von Valancius.' Du entstammst also tatsächlich Seberians Blutlinie. Ich weiß zwar nicht, ob du der Spur deines Ahnherren aus dem naiven Wunsch, ihn zu retten oder aufgrund eines ähnlichen Hangs zur Habgier gefolgt bist, aber ich bin sicher, du hast nichts dagegen, wenn ich dir erkläre, wie er — und jetzt auch du — hier gelandet ist."
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: "Eine interessante Wortwahl — 'Tod den Feinden derer von Valancius.' Du entstammst also tatsächlich Seberians Blutlinie. Ich weiß zwar nicht, ob du der Spur deines Ahnherren aus dem naiven Wunsch, ihn zu retten oder aufgrund eines ähnlichen Hangs zur Habgier gefolgt bist, aber ich bin sicher, du hast nichts dagegen, wenn ich dir erkläre, wie er — und jetzt auch du — hier gelandet ist."

languages.text: « "Mort aux ennemis de la maison von Valancius"... Une proclamation qui en dit long. Alors, vous appartenez bel et bien à la lignée de Seberian. J'ignore si c'est un désir naïf de sauver votre ancêtre qui vous a {mf|lancé|lancée} sur sa piste ou si vous avez simplement hérité de sa cupidité, mais dans un cas comme dans l'autre, je suis sûr que vous ne verrez aucun inconvénient à ce que je vous explique comment lui et vous êtes arrivés ici. »
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: « "Mort aux ennemis de la maison von Valancius"... Une proclamation qui en dit long. Alors, vous appartenez bel et bien à la lignée de Seberian. J'ignore si c'est un désir naïf de sauver votre ancêtre qui vous a {mf|lancé|lancée} sur sa piste ou si vous avez simplement hérité de sa cupidité, mais dans un cas comme dans l'autre, je suis sûr que vous ne verrez aucun inconvénient à ce que je vous explique comment lui et vous êtes arrivés ici. »

languages.text: "İlginç bir kelime seçimi... 'Von Valanciusların düşmanlarına ölüm.' Demek gerçekten de Seberian'ın kanındansın. Onu kurtarmak için saf bir arzu mu yoksa atanın izinden gitmeni sağlayan benzer bir açgözlülük eğilimi miydi bilmiyorum ama onun, şimdi de senin buraya nasıl geldiğinizi açıklarsam itiraz etmeyeceğine eminim."
languages.original_text: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."

traits.locale_text: "İlginç bir kelime seçimi... 'Von Valanciusların düşmanlarına ölüm.' Demek gerçekten de Seberian'ın kanındansın. Onu kurtarmak için saf bir arzu mu yoksa atanın izinden gitmeni sağlayan benzer bir açgözlülük eğilimi miydi bilmiyorum ama onun, şimdi de senin buraya nasıl geldiğinizi açıklarsam itiraz etmeyeceğine eminim."
